ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is commercial */,
  "is_industrial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is industrial */,
  "is_mixed_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is mixed-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the area */,
  "public_transport_access" TEXT /* Access to public transportation (e.g., bus, subway) */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* Average property value in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning category */,
  "zn" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning category */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zoning is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zoning is commercial */,
  "is_industrial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zoning is industrial */,
  "is_mixed_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zoning is mixed-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use category */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use category */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the land use is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the land use is commercial */,
  "is_industrial" INTEGER /* Indicates if the land use is industrial */,
  "is_mixed_use" INTEGER /* Indicates if the land use is mixed-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highway_access" (
  "highway_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highway accessibility category */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the highway accessibility category */,
  "distance_to_highway" REAL /* Distance to the nearest highway in miles */,
  "number_of_interchanges" INTEGER /* Number of highway interchanges within a certain radius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highway_access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxation" (
  "taxation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxation category */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxation category */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate as a percentage */,
  "property_tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Any property tax exemptions available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education category */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education category */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the area */,
  "average_school_rating" REAL /* Average rating of schools in the area */,
  "number_of_universities" INTEGER /* Number of universities in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, investor) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event (e.g., IP address, device used) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being predicted */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted housing price */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
